final:
module RefModule(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    output reg [15:0] result
);integer obf_i; // Declare the index variable 'obf_i'

always @(*) begin
    result = 0;
    for (obf_i = 0; obf_i < 8; obf_i = obf_i + 1) begin
        if (a[obf_i] == 1) begin
            result = result + (b << obf_i);
        end
    end
end

endmodule
